classes.name: Public metadata
classes.handling: Can be shown in user interfaces and logs when not combined with sensitive identifiers.

classes.name: Customer PII
classes.handling: Minimize collection, avoid raw logs, encrypt at rest, and restrict access to claims staff.

classes.name: Claim content
classes.handling: Treat as customer confidential data. Store encrypted and expose only through authorized claim workflows.

classes.name: Auth token
classes.handling: Never persist in logs. Validate issuer, audience, expiry, and tenant scope at service boundaries.

classes.name: Payment instruction
classes.handling: Require explicit approval state, audit trail, and privileged service access.

classes.name: Operational telemetry
classes.handling: Redact identifiers and preserve enough context for incident response.
